subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of God! His honour the Trustee was present and made mention of the maidservants of the True One, particularly those handmaidens who in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اماء الله جناب امین حاضر و ذکر کنیزان حق را نموده مخصوص امائیکه در ایام
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
